ddls:
CREATE TABLE "car_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the car model */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin of the car model */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Year the car model was produced */,
  "discontinued_year" INTEGER /* Year the car model was discontinued */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine used in the car model */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission used in the car model */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive used in the car model */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the car model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_models_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_models_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was established */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Manufacturer's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the origin belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decades" (
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decade */,
  "decade_name" TEXT /* Name of the decade */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the decade */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the decade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "example_types" (
  "example_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each example type */,
  "example_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the example type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the example type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "sale_region" TEXT /* Region where the sale took place */,
  "sale_country" TEXT /* Country where the sale took place */,
  "sale_city" TEXT /* City where the sale took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_sales_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the preference */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model being preferred */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date of the preference */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference */,
  "preference_source" TEXT /* Source of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model being sold */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)
